definition: All applicants minus first-time applicants; published directly in FACTS Chart 1.
Calculated residual: All minus Men minus Women. It may include Another Gender Identity and people who did not report gender.
Medical students enrolled as of October 31, including students on leave, using the AAMC Table 1 definition.
Matriculants divided by applicants. This is a national aggregate ratio, not an individual medical school's acceptance rate.
error indicates an internal arithmetic inconsistency; warning indicates two official source files disagree.
The entering medical-school academic year reported by AAMC.
